text.title: Gumroad Ops Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in indie Gumroad operations. Each pairs symptom + root cause + fix keyed to a methodology rule.

antipattern.symptom: Listing cover renders blurry on the Gumroad product page and on social previews; conversion rate < 1%.
antipattern.root-cause: Cover uploaded at <1280×720; Gumroad upscales it for the product hero, producing visible artefacts.
antipattern.fix: Re-export cover at ≥1600×900 PNG. Verify via the validator (r1 + listing.cover_width_px / cover_height_px checks). Push and re-snapshot Open Graph.

antipattern.symptom: EU buyer reports being charged VAT twice — once by Gumroad checkout, once on the founder's separate invoice. Refund request + complaint email.
antipattern.root-cause: Founder kept the pre-Gumroad invoicing flow active even after enabling Gumroad as Merchant of Record.
antipattern.fix: Disable the parallel VAT invoice for Gumroad-source orders. Gumroad's receipt is the legal invoice. Issue refund for the duplicate VAT; apology email. Rule r2.

antipattern.symptom: Software pirated 48h after launch — same hard-coded key appears in cracked builds on GitHub.
antipattern.root-cause: License key embedded in the binary; no online validation.
antipattern.fix: Wire Gumroad License API: `POST /v2/licenses/verify` at startup + daily. Revoke compromised keys. Re-issue per-buyer keys via Gumroad. Rule r3.

antipattern.symptom: Affiliate complains their tracked clicks show 0 conversions despite known sales; affiliate quits the program.
antipattern.root-cause: Founder's checkout URL drops the `?affiliate=` parameter when redirecting through their own landing page.
antipattern.fix: Preserve affiliate query params through every hop. Test the affiliate flow end-to-end before announcing the program. Set commission_pct in [30, 50] per r4 to keep affiliates engaged.
